events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial construction, form build & bracing, observed field condition: blowout evidence. Work rough-complete. Reference ACI 347. Treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. Need decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant? Blowout evidence indicates concrete form blowout, likely structural failure/hazard, defective installed. Need component_conditions installed-defective, maybe failed. Percent complete 70. Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty. Findings: evidence of form blowout, compromised formwork integrity, potential concrete loss/voids, safety hazard. Actions: immediate stop work, inspect all forms/bracing, remove/replace damaged components, verify design capacity per ACI 347, repair concrete defects, re-inspect before pour/continuation. Rationale. References ACI 347. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "failed"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Evidence of form blowout observed on installed formwork/bracing",
    "Blowout indicates formwork capacity was exceeded or improperly assembled",
    "Concrete loss, voids, or structural deficiency may have occurred",
    "Existing bracing and ties may be damaged, loosened, or inadequate",
    "Condition poses immediate safety and quality risk"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work in affected area and secure the site",
    "Inspect all formwork, ties, bracing, and supports for damage or failure",
    "Remove and replace defective/damaged formwork components",
    "Verify formwork design and bracing adequacy per ACI 347 for anticipated concrete pressures",
    "Repair any resulting concrete defects or honeycombing",
    "Obtain re-inspection approval before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Blowout evidence on roughed-in formwork is a failure condition indicating the form system was overloaded, improperly installed, or deficient. Per ACI 347, formwork must be designed and constructed to safely support all applied loads without failure. Because the installation is defective and creates a high safety/quality risk, the work fails inspection and must be corrected before progress can continue.",
  "references": ["ACI 347"]
}
